title: say-more-missingfunds
description: tell me more info about your missing funds

actions.value:
Hello {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

Could you please give us some more details about this Missing Funds issue?

 

Depending on what kind of transaction it is, it could simply be a matter of 3rd-party exchange processing times, in which case waiting will be required. If funds have surely been sent, then it could be that a wallet on your device has gone out-of-sync with the latest blockchain information, and a simple Resync action on your receiving wallet will solve this.

 

Any additional information, like a transaction ID or screenshots, will help us gain more insight to better assist you with locating these missing funds.
 
Kind regards,
{{current_user.first_name}}

Hello {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

Could you please give us some more details about this Missing Funds issue?

Depending on what kind of transaction it is, it could simply be a matter of 3rd-party exchange processing times, in which case waiting will be required. If funds have surely been sent, then it could be that a wallet on your device has gone out-of-sync with the latest blockchain information, and a simple Resync action on your receiving wallet will solve this.

Any additional information, like a transaction ID or screenshots, will help us gain more insight to better assist you with locating these missing funds.
 
Kind regards,
{{current_user.first_name}}
